input_text: The letter was written in June. If X is cool then X is red. Tallinn is hardly in Latvia. The cat slept on the velvet sofa. Earth contains Europe. A very big mouse is nice. Penguins happily live in water. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. The woman holding a lamp sang. Daniel journeyed to the office. John had a car which Eve bought. A promotion was given to Mary. Sandra moved to the kitchen. Clinton defeated Dole. "Riga is outside America. The cake was eaten. Amazon's length is 20 kilometers. John had a car Mike bought?
